'''Mandalorian assault rifles''' were powerful weapons. They were so powerful that they were considered almost overpowered for their size. However, this wouldn't bother their [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] users who, in general, were not known for subtlety during war. The weapon was short and had a thumb through stock with a small scope. This design was further modified by [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] to create an [[Assault blaster rifle]].

[[File:Young_Canderous_Ordo.jpg|thumb|left|125px|A young Canderous Ordo uses a Mandalorian Assault Rifle.]]

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
